title: Channel & Partnerships
shortSummary: Not all revenue comes from direct sales. Learn partner sales, channel strategy, co-selling, and how to build an ecosystem that multiplies your reach.
whyItMatters: The most successful technology companies sell through partners as well as direct. Channel partnerships — resellers, referral partners, technology partners, system integrators — can multiply your reach and revenue without multiplying your headcount. Understanding how to build, manage, and co-sell with partners is a valuable and increasingly in-demand skill.
coreConcepts: Channel models: reseller, referral, technology, SI
Co-selling: joint discovery, joint demos, deal registration
Measuring partner ROI and programme health
